workflow_repair.token_check_scope: executable code only (exclude comments and docstrings)

canonicalization.end_ms_normalization: coerce end_ms to int after trim; invalid -> 0
canonicalization.muted_normalization: booleans unchanged; strings true/1/yes => true, all other strings => false; non-string/non-bool use Python bool(value)
canonicalization.dedupe_by_alert_id: keep highest end_ms; tie-break by severity rank p1>p2>p3>p4, then longer normalized signature, then lexicographically larger normalized env; if still tied keep first seen row in input order

freeze_overlap.freeze_canonicalization: normalize env/start/end, drop end<=start, compact overlap/touch intervals per env

reopen_windows.reopen_canonicalization: normalize env/scope/start/end, drop end<=start, compact overlap/touch intervals per (env,severity_scope)
reopen_windows.reopen_overlap_union: collect overlap segments from matching scopes then compact/union those segments to compute reopen_overlap_ms and reopen_segment_count
reopen_windows.stability_pressure_score: probe window [end_ms-180, end_ms+1) using reopen all + severity scopes; score=(all_probe_ms//30)+(severity_probe_ms//20)+max(alert_count-1,0)

rotation_windows.rotation_canonicalization: normalize env/scope/start/end, drop end<=start, compact overlap/touch intervals per (env,severity_scope)
rotation_windows.rotation_overlap_union: collect overlap segments from matching scopes then compact/union those segments to compute rotation_overlap_ms and rotation_segment_count

defer_windows.defer_canonicalization: normalize env/scope/start/end, drop end<=start, compact overlap/touch intervals per (env,severity_scope)
defer_windows.defer_overlap_union: collect overlap segments from matching scopes then compact/union those segments to compute defer_overlap_ms and defer_segment_count

risk_ledger.evaluation_scope: state is independent per normalized env
risk_ledger.evaluation_order: process each env's merged windows in start_ms ascending order after all four attenuation layers are complete
risk_ledger.state_update: finalize carry_out_ms for one window before evaluating the next window in the same env

priority_rules.critical: max_severity == p1 and ledger_adjusted_actionable_ms >= 235, or ledger_adjusted_actionable_ms >= 500, or stability_index >= 20
priority_rules.high: ledger_adjusted_actionable_ms >= 265, or alert_count >= 3 with max_severity in {p1,p2}, or rotation_segment_count == 0 with risk_adjusted_duration_ms >= 340, or defer_pressure_score > 0 with dispatchable_duration_ms >= 320, or reopen_segment_count == 0 with duration_ms >= 420

response_queue.json_format: compact JSON lines via json.dumps(..., separators=(',', ':'))

summary_json.total_unmuted_duration_ms_contract: sum of merged window duration_ms values from drift_windows.json (not raw alert durations)
summary_json.total_ledger_adjusted_actionable_ms_cont: sum ledger_adjusted_actionable_ms over all drift windows, including windows not admitted to the response queue
summary_json.freeze_compaction_checksum: sha256 over compacted freeze rows env|start_ms|end_ms
summary_json.reopen_compaction_checksum: sha256 over compacted reopen rows env|severity_scope|start_ms|end_ms
summary_json.rotation_compaction_checksum: sha256 over compacted rotation rows env|severity_scope|start_ms|end_ms
summary_json.defer_compaction_checksum: sha256 over compacted defer rows env|severity_scope|start_ms|end_ms
summary_json.queue_hash_checksum: sha256('|'.join(queue_hash values in final queue order)) lowercase 64 hex chars
summary_json.window_digest_checksum: sha256('|'.join(window_digest values in final queue order)) lowercase 64 hex chars
summary_json.ledger_checksum: sha256 over env-sorted, start_ms-sorted window lines env|start_ms|idle_gap_ms|carry_in_ms|carry_out_ms|ledger_adjusted_actionable_ms
